dialog_2.name: SCOUT
dialog_2.text: I mapped out most of this maze already. The rooms are all connected in a strange pattern.

dialog_3.name: SCOUT
dialog_3.text: My advice? Head south first. The treasures are always in the hidden paths.

dialog_4.name: SCOUT
dialog_4.text: And watch out for the Groundbreaker in the final room. He's no joke!
